user.title: Connect to OpenWA
user.description: Enter the URL of your OpenWA server and an API key (the API master key or a key you created in the OpenWA dashboard).

session.title: Choose WhatsApp session
session.description: Select which linked WhatsApp session this integration should use.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to OpenWA. Check the URL and that the server is reachable.
error.no_sessions: No WhatsApp session found. Link a device in the OpenWA dashboard first.

abort.already_configured: This WhatsApp session is already configured.

init.title: OpenWA options
init.description: Set a default recipient to expose a notify entity that always sends to that number.

data_description.default_recipient: Phone number without + (e.g. 4915233535738) or a full chat id. Leave empty to disable the notify entity.

send_message.name: Send WhatsApp message
send_message.description: Send a WhatsApp text message through OpenWA.

to.name: To
to.description: Recipient number in international format without + (e.g. 4915233535738) or a full chat id (12345@c.us / 12345@g.us).

entry_id.name: Account
entry_id.description: Which OpenWA account to use (only needed with more than one).
